name: stedt-site
description: Client-side WASM-SQLite search bundle for the static STEDT site

scripts.build:search: mkdir -p site/assets && cp node_modules/sql.js-httpvfs/dist/sqlite.worker.js node_modules/sql.js-httpvfs/dist/sql-wasm.wasm site/assets/ && esbuild src/search.js --bundle --format=esm --minify --outfile=site/assets/stedt-search.js
